trends.name: Korean Ssam Bar Snacks
trends.short descriptor: Grilled meats, banchan, and build-your-own lettuce wraps taking over late dinners.
trends.WHY IT'S EVERYWHERE:
People pass lettuce and ssamjang mid-meal.
Nobody wants the table to quiet down.
Late dinners stretch without anyone noticing.
WHAT TO ORDER: Pork belly ssam with perilla leaf, rice, and ssamjang — build it yourself, eat it in one bite
trends.MOST SPOTTED:
Yangban Society (Downtown LA)
Here's Looking At You (Koreatown)
Bar Sinizki (West Hollywood)
trends.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Yangban Society — bigger spread, more composed plates
trends.EASY ENTRY: Here's Looking At You — more casual, still hits
trends.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Korean Ssam Bar Snacks” (query “Korean Ssam Bar Snacks Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.5 · ~7407 review rollups.

trends.name: Sonoran-Style Breakfast Burritos
trends.short descriptor: Flour tortillas, eggs, potato, and crisped machaca-style fills—morning lines stretching outside Highland Park and Boyle Heights pits.
trends.WHY IT'S EVERYWHERE:
Morning lines want something heavy to hold.
It survives the commute without falling apart.
Taquerías keep swapping in thicker tortillas.
trends.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Cilantro Mexican Grill (Glassell Park) — Bacon-egg blistered tortilla roll
trends.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Sonoran-Style Breakfast Burritos” (query “Sonoran-Style Breakfast Burritos Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.4 · ~7909 review rollups.

trends.name: Hainan Chicken Lunch Counters
trends.short descriptor: Ginger-poached bird, chicken-fat rice, and three-sauce trays popping up as fast daytime platters from Westlake to the SGV.
trends.WHY IT'S EVERYWHERE:
Lighter than fried, still satisfying.
Shows up in quick lunch spots.
Easy repeat order.
trends.MOST SPOTTED: Side Chick (Arcadia) — Half Hainan chicken plate
trends.EASY ENTRY: Side Chick (Arcadia) — Half Hainan chicken plate
trends.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Hainan Chicken Lunch Counters” (query “Hainan Chicken Lunch Counters Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.3 · ~6117 review rollups.

trends.name: Aguachile on Ice
trends.short descriptor: Chilled, citrusy aguachile served ice-cold — bright, spicy, and built for warm LA nights.
trends.WHY IT'S EVERYWHERE:
People are ordering it first.
Cold + citrus hits before anything else.
Works in LA heat.
WHAT TO ORDER: Shrimp aguachile verde — heavy lime, serrano heat, sliced cucumber, served ice-cold with tostadas.
trends.MOST SPOTTED: Holbox (Downtown LA) — Shrimp aguachile verde — heavy lime, serrano heat, sliced cucumber, served ice-cold with tostadas.
trends.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Holbox — pristine seafood, deeper citrus, cleaner heat.
trends.EASY ENTRY: Mariscos Jalisco — faster, louder, and just as craveable.
trends.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Aguachile on Ice” (query “Aguachile on Ice Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.5 · ~20491 review rollups.

trends.name: Natural Wine “Martini” Hour
trends.short descriptor: Chilled natural wines poured like martinis — early evening, low-key buzz, everywhere right now.
trends.WHY IT'S EVERYWHERE:
People treat funky pours like cocktails.
One glass turns into the whole night.
Sidewalk seats fill around sunset.
WHAT TO ORDER: Skin-contact white or chilled red — served cold, slightly cloudy, poured fast and refilled often
Skin-contact white or chilled red — served cold, slightly cloudy, poured fast and refilled often
Skin-contact white or chilled red — served cold, slightly cloudy, poured fast and refilled often
trends.MOST SPOTTED: Bar Bandini (Echo Park); Tabula Rasa (Silver Lake); Melody (Virgil Village)
trends.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Bar Bandini (Echo Park) — deeper list, more interesting pours, slower vibe
trends.EASY ENTRY: Tabula Rasa (Silver Lake) — approachable, louder, easy to slide into
trends.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Natural Wine “Martini” Hour” (query “Natural Wine “Martini” Hour Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.6 · ~12170 review rollups.

aboutToHit.name: Olive Oil Dessert Loops
aboutToHit.short descriptor: Whipped mascarpone, citrus, and grassy olive oil looping onto cakes and soft-serve on dessert-only cards.
aboutToHit.WHY IT'S EVERYWHERE:
Guests still want that 'clean' dessert shot.
Olive oil reads fancy without chocolate.
Pastry teams trial it on weekends first.
WHAT TO ORDER: Whipped ricotta olive oil dip dessert
aboutToHit.MOST SPOTTED: Botanica Restaurant (Silver Lake) — Olive oil soft serve swirl
aboutToHit.WORTH THE SPLURGE: République Café (Mid-Wilshire) — Whipped ricotta olive oil dip dessert
aboutToHit.EASY ENTRY: Botanica Restaurant (Silver Lake) — Olive oil soft serve swirl
aboutToHit.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Olive Oil Dessert Loops” (query “Olive Oil Dessert Loops Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.4 · ~9121 review rollups.

aboutToHit.name: Filipino BBQ Skewer Nights
aboutToHit.short descriptor: Sweet-savory pork and chicken skewer platters with calamansi, garlic rice, and banana ketchup nods on patio menus.
aboutToHit.WHY IT'S EVERYWHERE:
Patios want a pile of sticks on the table.
Breweries like loud, shareable protein.
Trays slide across outdoor seating.
aboutToHit.MOST SPOTTED: LASA Supper Club (Chinatown) — Calamansi-glazed pork stick
aboutToHit.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Weekend brewery pop-ups (Arts District) — Garlic rice family tray
aboutToHit.EASY ENTRY: LASA Supper Club (Chinatown) — Calamansi-glazed pork stick
aboutToHit.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Filipino BBQ Skewer Nights” (query “Filipino BBQ Skewer Nights Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.4 · ~9368 review rollups.

aboutToHit.name: Ube Basque Cheesecake Slices
aboutToHit.short descriptor: Burnt tops, purple yam custard centers, and Filipino-dessert crossovers landing on pastry cases from Sawtelle to Long Beach.
aboutToHit.WHY IT'S EVERYWHERE:
Purple cakes still crush on the feed.
Tiny kitchens can trial it Saturday only.
Low stakes before full dessert menus.
aboutToHit.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Smorgasburg pastry stalls (Downtown LA) — Pandan swirl cheesecake
aboutToHit.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 6 result(s) for “Ube Basque Cheesecake Slices” (query “Ube Basque Cheesecake Slices Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.7 · ~670 review rollups.
